isi.lyrics:
Lyric Monsta X - enemies with benefits

Romanization

What happens after midnight
I crave you and I make my way to Malibu

Red flags all through the city
That toxic kind of history
But I still crawl to you

I know that we said goodbye
But I just meant until next time
You’re the worst and so am I
Brought a bottle of pink champagne
You don’t gotta look in my eyes

Baby we ain’t even friends
We’re just enemies with benefits
How’d I end up in your bed
Swear that I’m a fiend for your lips

Kissing me killin’ me slow
Hate you but I need you close
Screw what I said yeah I’ll do it again
Baby we ain’t even friends
We’re just enemies with benefits

Got bite marks on my neckline
You pull me like a riptide drowning in your arms

Your poison can’t get enough
Way you go down you start me up
My body never listens to my heart

I know that we said goodbye
But I just meant until next time
You’re the worst and so am I
Brought a bottle of pink champagne
You don’t gotta look in my eyes

Baby we ain’t even friends
We’re just enemies with benefits
How’d I end up in your bed
Swear that I’m a fiend for your lips

Kissing me killin’ me slow
Hate you but I need you close
Screw what I said yeah I’ll do it again
Baby we ain’t even friends
We’re just enemies with benefits

Hangeul

What happens after midnight
I crave you and I make my way to Malibu

Red flags all through the city
That toxic kind of history
But I still crawl to you

I know that we said goodbye
But I just meant until next time
You’re the worst and so am I
Brought a bottle of pink champagne
You don’t gotta look in my eyes

Baby we ain’t even friends
We’re just enemies with benefits
How’d I end up in your bed
Swear that I’m a fiend for your lips

Kissing me killin’ me slow
Hate you but I need you close
Screw what I said yeah I’ll do it again
Baby we ain’t even friends
We’re just enemies with benefits

Got bite marks on my neckline
You pull me like a riptide drowning in your arms

Your poison can’t get enough
Way you go down you start me up
My body never listens to my heart

I know that we said goodbye
But I just meant until next time
You’re the worst and so am I
Brought a bottle of pink champagne
You don’t gotta look in my eyes

Baby we ain’t even friends
We’re just enemies with benefits
How’d I end up in your bed
Swear that I’m a fiend for your lips

Kissing me killin’ me slow
Hate you but I need you close
Screw what I said yeah I’ll do it again
Baby we ain’t even friends
We’re just enemies with benefits

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Monsta X - glass half empty

Romanization

I'm always staying up
’Til the clock hits two, just trying to work through
all your drama with you
I'm always saving you, but I got problems too
Putting you first don't help me solve ’em quicker

They’re taking all that I got,
I'm giving more than I have
And I'm the one who ends up with nothing
Everything comes at a cost and I can't cover the tab
Honestly, it's been a long time coming

I ain't saying that I'm running out of love for you
But someday all this giving just might get me
Don't know how long I can try to fill it up for you
If I keep pouring from a glass half empty

Man, it's hard to be a people pleaser
Making me a priority ain't getting any easier
Don't know how long I can try to fill it up for you
If I keep pouring from a glass half empty

Yeah, I tried to be there for you,
pick you up from the airport
Help you move into that new studio,
it's true I care for ya
But I'm starting to realize that I need more me time
’Cause I'm out here drowning
even though I say I'm fine

I ain't saying that I'm running out of love for you
But someday all this giving just might get me
Don't know how long I can try to fill it up for you
If I keep pouring from a glass half empty

Man, it's hard to be a people pleaser
Making me a priority ain't getting any easier
Don't know how long I can try to fill it up for you
If I keep pouring from a glass half empty

They’re taking all that I got,
I'm giving more than I have
And I'm the one who ends up with nothing
Everything comes at a cost and I can't cover the tab
Honestly, it's been a long time coming

I ain't saying that I'm running out of love for you
But someday all this giving just might get me
Don't know how long I can try to fill it up for you
If I keep pouring from a glass half empty

Man, it's hard to be a people pleaser

Don't know how long I can try to fill it up for you
If I keep pouring from a glass half empty

Honestly, it's been a long time coming

Don't know how long I can try to fill it up for you
If I keep pouring from a glass half empty
